vocab.meaning: ngắm nhìn (một cách ngưỡng mộ hoặc tôn kính)
vocab.example: Standing at the foot of the Swiss Alps, I felt incredibly small as I gazed upon the snow-capped peaks.

vocab.meaning: tình cờ thấy, tình cờ gặp
vocab.example: While wandering through the old town in Prague, we came across a hidden courtyard filled with blooming roses.

vocab.meaning: nhìn ra hướng (thường nói về vị trí từ trên cao nhìn xuống)
vocab.example: Our balcony in Santorini looked out on the deep blue caldera, offering a view that was simply surreal.

vocab.meaning: bừng sáng, chiếu sáng rực rỡ
vocab.example: The way the sunrise lit up the golden spires of the temples in Bagan was a sight I will never forget.
From the top of the dunes, the Sahara Desert seemed to stretch away into the infinite horizon.

vocab.meaning: hòa quyện vào (tạo nên một vẻ đẹp hài hòa)
vocab.example: I loved how the ancient stone cottages in the Cotswolds perfectly blended in with the rolling green hills.
The giant redwood trees in California tower over everything else, creating a cathedral-like atmosphere in the forest.
The moonlight reflecting off the calm surface of Halong Bay created a shimmering path of silver on the water.
The tiny, colorful fishing boats dotted around the harbor added a charming touch to the coastal landscape.

vocab.meaning: gợi nhớ lại (khiến ai đó nhớ về một khoảnh khắc đẹp)
vocab.example: Whenever I see photos of the Aurora Borealis, it takes me back to that freezing but magical night in Iceland.
